creator: dereckson@gmail.com
text:
I'm preparing a FreeBSD port for bitcoin.  This application requires wxWidgets 2.9.

I so contacted fjoe@freebsd.org, the port maintainer, who agree to update them after they've been repo-copied, and asked me to do the request.

Please repo-copy the following ports:
x11-toolkits/wxgtk28 -> x11-toolkits/wxgtk29
x11-toolkits/wxgtk28-common -> x11-toolkits/wxgtk29-common
x11-toolkits/wxgtk28-contrib -> x11-toolkits/wxgtk29-contrib
x11-toolkits/wxgtk28-contrib-common -> x11-toolkits/wxgtk29-contrib-common
x11-toolkits/wxgtk28-unicode -> x11-toolkits/wxgtk29-unicode
x11-toolkits/wxgtk28-unicode-contrib -> x11-toolkits/wxgtk29-unicode-contrib
